defs: A statue of gigantic size. The name was especially applied to certain famous statues in antiquity, as the Colossus of Nero in Rome, the Colossus of Apollo at Rhodes.
quotes: He doth bestride the narrow world Like a colossus.
notes: ☞ There is no authority for the statement that the legs of the Colossus at Rhodes extended over the mouth of the harbor.

defs: Any man or beast of gigantic size.
